name: daisyui-blueprint
description: Official daisyUI MCP server. Requires a paid license from https://daisyui.com/blueprint

license.title: Blueprint License Key
license.description: Get your license key from https://daisyui.com/blueprint

email.title: Email
email.description: Email used for your Blueprint license

figma_api_key.title: Figma Personal Access Token (optional)
figma_api_key.description:
Get it from Figma: 
Settings > Security > Personal Access Tokens > Generate new token. 
Required permissions are 
`file_content:read` 
`file_metadata:read` 
`library_assets:read` 
`library_content:read` 
`team_library_content:read` 
`file_dev_resources:read`
